query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}} 
 | count by c_ip,x_forwarded_for,_source | concat (x_forwarded_for,",",c_ip) as xffi | parse regex field=xffi "(?<i>[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3})" nodrop | sum(_count) as ip_count  by i ,_source| where IsPublicIp (i) | i as c_ip 
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| where !isEmpty(country_name)
| count as visitors by country_name
| sort visitors 
| compare with timeshift 1d
| order by visitors desc
| limit 5

sources.dashboardDescription: The Nginx - Logs Timeline Analysis Dashboard provides a high-level view of the activity and health of Nginx servers on your network. Dashboard panels display visual graphs and detailed information on traffic volume and distribution, responses over time, as well as time comparisons for visitor locations and server hits.
sources.panelTitle: Visitor Locations (Top 5 Countries) - Today Vs. Yesterday
